prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约48757→54709→78852→67547→84617，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约84617名；2023年因扩招幅度较大位次大幅后移至78852，2 024年略有回升至67547，2025年再度后移至84617；物理类计划2021年39人、2022年43人、2023年91人、2024年86人、2025年91人；2026年计划大幅增至1 33人，较2025年扩招约46.2%，为近年最大扩幅，显著加剧竞争压力，位次预计明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年排名约第 120名，近年排名稳定在116–122区间，属中游211层次；该校在声誉舆情文件中未出现显著负面或正面事件，整体舆情平稳；抖音热度排名第95，评价为"一般" ，短视频曝光量较低，报考关注度无明显异常波动；未见投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中食品科学与工程获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的 食品科学与工程类直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度持续偏热，该校相关 专业（计算机类、电气类、数据科学与大数据技术等）受益；2026年广东省物理类考生约456,000人，较2025年440,208人增加约3.6%，竞争加剧。 东北农业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，与广东省跨省距离较远，地域偏好对广东考生报考意愿有一定抑制。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次84617名、2026年物理类计划大幅扩招约46.2%导致竞争加剧、广东省物理类考生增加约3.6%进一步推高竞争、以及学校声誉平稳无异常波动等因素 ，预测2026年物理类最低位次约110047名，区间109547–110547名。

- 电气工程及其自动化
- 数据科学与大数据技术。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年物理类大幅扩招，位次预计后移至约11万名附近。建议位次在10.9万–11.1万区间内的考生以二档专业为主力填报，一档专业（计算机类、电气类）可作为冲刺选择，三档 专业作为保底。位次优于10.9万可重点冲刺一档热门专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated from approximately 48,757 → 54,709 → 78,852 → 67,547 → 84,617, showing an overall trend of moving backward with fluctuations. The baseline for 2025 is about 84,617. In 2023, due to a significant expansion in enrollment, the ranking dropped sharply to 78,852, rebounded slightly to 67,547 in 2024, and then moved back to 84,617 in 2025. The Physics Category enrollment plan was 39 in 2021, 43 in 2022, 91 in 2023, 86 in 2024, and 91 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 133, an expansion of about 46.2% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, which will significantly intensify competition and is expected to cause a notable backward shift in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately ranked 120th, with recent rankings stable in the 116–122 range, placing it in the mid-tier of 211 universities. In reputation and public opinion documents, no significant negative or positive events were found, and overall public opinion is stable. On Douyin, its popularity ranking is 95th, rated as 'average,' with low short video exposure and no abnormal fluctuations in application attention. No records of enrollment gaps were observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering major in the enrollment plan, which has some appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly popular in society. Related majors at this university (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, etc.) benefit from this trend. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong Province is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, intensifying competition. Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, which is far from Guangdong Province, and geographical preferences may somewhat suppress the willingness of Guangdong candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 84,617, the significant expansion of the Physics Category enrollment plan by about 46.2% in 2026 leading to intensified competition, the increase in Guangdong Physics Category examinees by about 3.6% further raising competition, and the stable reputation without abnormal fluctuations, the predicted minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 110,047, with a range of 109,547 to 110,547.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Data Science and Big Data Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Engineering (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Agricultural Mechanization and Automation)
- Food Science and Engineering
- Veterinary Medicine
- Finance.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Animal Production (including Animal Science, Grassland Science, Aquaculture)
- Environmental Science and Engineering
- Landscape Architecture
- Pharmaceutical Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category sees a significant expansion, with rankings expected to shift backward to around 110,000. Candidates with rankings in the 109,000–111,000 range are advised to primarily fill Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering) as reach options and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. Candidates with rankings better than 109,000 can focus on reaching for popular Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 10224 → 10864 → 12671 → 12452 → 36305. From 2021 to 2024, the ranking fluctuated narrowly within the 10,000–13,000 range. In 2025, due to special enrollment programs such as Business Administration (China-US 121 Dual Degree Program), the minimum ranking dropped sharply to 36305, causing an abnormal shift in the baseline ranking. History Category enrollment plans: 6 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 9 in 2024, 14 in 2025; in 2026, the plan significantly increases to 23, an expansion of approximately 64.3% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, and the ranking is expected to shift noticeably downward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 120th, placing it at the mid-tier 211 level. The university's reputation is stable, with no significant negative incidents; its Douyin popularity ranking is 95th, with a rating of 'average', indicating low application attention; no record of enrollment gaps; Food Science and Engineering (A-) is the university's only A- or above discipline, and it has no direct connection with History Category enrollment majors (Law, Finance, Business Administration, Chinese International Education, etc.), so the advantage of this discipline has limited appeal to History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity (recommended), Finance/Finance/Economics categories are divided and wait-and-see, Business Administration is clearly discouraged; in 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Guangdong Province is approximately 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% compared to 292,200 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Guangdong Province, and regional preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of Guangdong History Category candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 36305 (including the abnormal value from the China-US program), the significant expansion of History Category enrollment by about 64.3% in 2026, and the increase in Guangdong History Category candidates by about 11.6%, the expansion effect outweighs the candidate increase effect. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 48808, with a range of 48308–49308.

- Law
- Finance (including Finance, Insurance, International Economics and Trade).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Chinese International Education.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, History Category enrollment expands significantly, and the ranking is expected to shift downward to around 49,000. It is recommended that candidates with rankings in the 48,000–49,000 range focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors (Law, Finance) can be attempted, and Tier 3 majors serve as safety options. Candidates with rankings better than 48,000 can prioritize Tier 1 majors.
